title: WELD: The Notarized Marketplace
tagline: A welded storefront where each completed sealed order emits a seller-signed receipt anyone can verify.
holy_shit: This is a weld of a weld: live Issues inventory + AES-sealed orders + SHA-256 custody now produce ECDSA-notarized receipts, so buyers can prove a seller key signed the exact completed order — no backend, no forgery, no take-backs.
powered_by: The Sealed Storefront weld (IssuesDB availability + AES-256-GCM order sealing + SHA-256 custody chain) plus The Unbreakable Promise ECDSA P-256 sign/verify receipt loop
weld: Keep the Sealed Storefront flow intact, then sign each completed custody-stamped order with an ECDSA seller key so every buyer gets a cryptographically verifiable receipt bound to the exact sealed envelope and custody head.
agent_scenario: When you need: a zero-backend marketplace where inventory is live, orders stay sealed, custody is tamper-evident, and every completion emits a seller-signed receipt buyers can verify independently.
author: kody-w + Copilot
